chr.name: County Health Rankings & Roadmaps
chr.organization: University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute
chr.location: County Health Rankings & Roadmaps Annual Data
chr.description: The County Health Rankings & Roadmaps (CHR&R) program, a collaboration between the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and the University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute, ranks the health of nearly all counties in the nation. The annual rankings measure vital health factors including high school graduation rates, obesity, smoking, unemployment, access to healthy foods, the quality of air and water, income inequality, and teen births that influence how long and how well we live. Data are released annually and cover all U.S. counties. Raw data are publicly available through the Zenodo repository (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18157681) and span release years 2010 through the present.
chr.restrictions: CC BY 4.0. Attribution required. Cite as: University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute. County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. https://www.countyhealthrankings.org.

acs5.name: 2024 American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates, Powered by Metopio
acs5.location: Census API — ACS 5-Year Detailed Tables and Subject Tables
acs5.description: Extraction and formatting provided by Metopio, The American Community Survey (ACS) is an ongoing survey conducted by the U.S. Census Bureau that provides detailed demographic, social, economic, and housing data for communities across the United States. The 5-year estimates pool data over a 60-month period, providing greater statistical reliability for small geographic areas (including ZIP Code Tabulation Areas) at the cost of timeliness. Variables cover a broad range of social determinants of health including poverty, housing, education, employment, insurance coverage, and racial/ethnic composition. Data are retrieved via the Census Bureau's public API using the censusapi R package.
acs5.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. Census Bureau data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

census_ua_county.name: 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File
census_ua_county.location: 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File (XLSX)
census_ua_county.description: The 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File maps Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas with population ≥ 50,000 and urban clusters with population 2,500–49,999) to counties. Each row represents a county-urban area intersection and includes the share of county population, land area, and housing units within that urban area. Summing across all urban areas for a county yields total percent urban. Counties not appearing in the file have no urban area and are considered 100% rural. Urban area boundaries are based on the 2020 decennial Census and reflect the updated delineation methodology that increased the minimum population threshold for urbanized areas from 50,000 to 50,000 and revised cluster definitions.
census_ua_county.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. Census Bureau data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

epic.name: Epic Cosmos
epic.description: Epic Cosmos is a HIPAA-compliant aggregated dataset built from the electronic health records of participating health systems using Epic, covering more than 300 million patients. Prevalence estimates reflect patients seen within participating health systems and the share of each county's population captured varies; counties with low capture may be unrepresentative.
epic.restrictions: Epic Cosmos data require attribution to Epic Cosmos.

brfss.name: Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System
brfss.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
brfss.description: The Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) is an annual state-based telephone survey of U.S. adults collecting self-reported data on health conditions and behaviors. Estimates are self-reported and carry sampling confidence intervals.
brfss.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

cms.name: CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities
cms.description: Chronic condition prevalence and preventive service utilization computed from Medicare fee-for-service claims. Estimates reflect the Medicare beneficiary population, not the general population, and small counts may be suppressed.
cms.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nis.name: National Immunization Survey
nis.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nis.description: The National Immunization Survey (NIS) estimates childhood vaccination coverage from a national telephone survey with provider-verified vaccination histories. Coverage is reported by birth cohort at milestone ages; the most recent cohorts have not yet reached all milestone ages.
nis.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

svv.name: SchoolVaxView
svv.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
svv.description: SchoolVaxView reports vaccination coverage and exemption rates among kindergartners, compiled from state and local immunization programs. Coverage and exemption definitions vary by state.
svv.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs.name: National Center for Health Statistics
nchs.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nchs.description: The National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) compiles U.S. mortality data from death certificates, including provisional drug overdose counts and age-adjusted death rates by cause. Provisional counts are subject to revision and some are suppressed or pending investigation.
nchs.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

healthmap.name: HealthMap MMR Coverage
healthmap.description: County-level MMR vaccination coverage compiled and modeled by HealthMap from state and local immunization data. Coverage definitions vary by source jurisdiction.

wapo.name: Washington Post / state health departments
wapo.description: County- and school-level kindergarten MMR vaccination rates compiled by The Washington Post from state health department records. Coverage definitions vary by state.

fattah.name: County Vaccine Exemption Estimates
fattah.organization: PopHIVE, Yale School of Public Health
fattah.description: County- and state-level medical and non-medical MMR exemption rate estimates. Exemption definitions and reporting completeness vary by state; some county values are state-level estimates.

chr_premature_death.short_description: Years of potential life lost before age 75 per 100,000 population.
chr_premature_death.long_description: Years of potential life lost before age 75 per 100,000 population (age-adjusted). This measure captures the burden of premature death by weighting deaths that occur at younger ages more heavily.
chr_premature_death.statement: In {location}, the premature death rate was {value} years of potential life lost per 100,000 population.

chr_poor_or_fair_health.long_name: Adults Reporting Poor or Fair Health
chr_poor_or_fair_health.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting fair or poor health (age-adjusted).
chr_poor_or_fair_health.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting fair or poor health (age-adjusted), based on self-reported health status from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS).
chr_poor_or_fair_health.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported fair or poor health.

chr_uninsured_adults.short_description: Percentage of adults under age 65 without health insurance.
chr_uninsured_adults.long_description: Percentage of adults under age 65 without health insurance, from the Small Area Health Insurance Estimates (SAHIE) program.
chr_uninsured_adults.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults under 65 lacked health insurance.

chr_primary_care_physicians.short_description: Ratio of population to primary care physicians.
chr_primary_care_physicians.long_description: Ratio of the county population to the number of primary care physicians practicing in the county, based on data from the American Medical Association Physician Masterfile.
chr_primary_care_physicians.statement: In {location}, the primary care physician ratio was {value} residents per physician.

chr_preventable_hospital_stays.short_description: Rate of hospital stays for ambulatory-care sensitive conditions per 100,000 Medicare enrollees.
chr_preventable_hospital_stays.long_description: Discharge rate for ambulatory care-sensitive (preventable) conditions per 100,000 Medicare enrollees, from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care.
chr_preventable_hospital_stays.statement: In {location}, there were {value} preventable hospital stays per 100,000 Medicare enrollees.

chr_adult_smoking.short_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers (age-adjusted).
chr_adult_smoking.long_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers (age-adjusted), from the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS).
chr_adult_smoking.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults were current smokers.

chr_adult_obesity.long_description: Percentage of the adult population (age 18 and older) that reports a body mass index (BMI) greater than or equal to 30 kg/m2 (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.

chr_teen_births.short_description: Number of births per 1,000 female population ages 15-19.
chr_teen_births.long_description: Number of births per 1,000 female population ages 15-19, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Natality files.
chr_teen_births.statement: In {location}, there were {value} births per 1,000 females ages 15-19.

chr_homicides.short_description: Number of deaths due to homicide per 100,000 population.
chr_homicides.long_description: Number of deaths due to homicide per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_homicides.statement: In {location}, the homicide rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_high_school_graduation.short_description: Percentage of ninth-grade cohort that graduates in four years.
chr_high_school_graduation.long_description: Percentage of ninth-grade cohort that graduates in four years (on-time graduation rate), from EDFacts, U.S. Department of Education.
chr_high_school_graduation.statement: In {location}, {value}% of ninth-graders graduated within four years.

chr_unemployment.short_description: Percentage of population ages 16+ unemployed but seeking work.
chr_unemployment.long_description: Percentage of population ages 16 and older unemployed but seeking work, from the Bureau of Labor Statistics Local Area Unemployment Statistics.
chr_unemployment.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the labor force was unemployed.

chr_children_in_poverty.short_description: Percentage of people under age 18 in poverty.
chr_children_in_poverty.long_description: Percentage of people under age 18 in poverty, from the U.S. Census Bureau Small Area Income and Poverty Estimates (SAIPE).
chr_children_in_poverty.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children lived in poverty.

chr_poor_physical_health_days.long_name: Average Physically Unhealthy Days per Month
chr_poor_physical_health_days.short_description: Average number of physically unhealthy days reported in past 30 days (age-adjusted).
chr_poor_physical_health_days.long_description: Average number of physically unhealthy days reported in past 30 days (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_poor_physical_health_days.statement: In {location}, adults reported an average of {value} physically unhealthy days per month.

chr_low_birth_weight.short_description: Percentage of live births with low birth weight (< 2,500 grams).
chr_low_birth_weight.long_description: Percentage of live births with low birth weight (< 2,500 grams), from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Natality files.
chr_low_birth_weight.statement: In {location}, {value}% of live births had low birth weight.

chr_motor_vehicle_crash_deaths.short_description: Number of motor vehicle crash deaths per 100,000 population.
chr_motor_vehicle_crash_deaths.long_description: Number of motor vehicle crash deaths per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_motor_vehicle_crash_deaths.statement: In {location}, the motor vehicle crash death rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_poor_mental_health_days.long_name: Average Mentally Unhealthy Days per Month
chr_poor_mental_health_days.short_description: Average number of mentally unhealthy days reported in past 30 days (age-adjusted).
chr_poor_mental_health_days.long_description: Average number of mentally unhealthy days reported in past 30 days (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_poor_mental_health_days.statement: In {location}, adults reported an average of {value} mentally unhealthy days per month.

chr_income_inequality.short_description: Ratio of household income at the 80th percentile to income at the 20th percentile.
chr_income_inequality.long_description: Ratio of household income at the 80th percentile to income at the 20th percentile, from the American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_income_inequality.statement: In {location}, the income inequality ratio was {value} (80th/20th percentile).

chr_sexually_transmitted_infections.short_description: Number of newly diagnosed chlamydia cases per 100,000 population.
chr_sexually_transmitted_infections.long_description: Number of newly diagnosed chlamydia cases per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for HIV/AIDS, Viral Hepatitis, STD, and TB Prevention.
chr_sexually_transmitted_infections.statement: In {location}, there were {value} new chlamydia cases per 100,000 population.

chr_excessive_drinking.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting binge or heavy drinking (age-adjusted).
chr_excessive_drinking.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting binge or heavy drinking (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS. Binge drinking is defined as consuming 4+ drinks for women or 5+ drinks for men on a single occasion.
chr_excessive_drinking.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported excessive drinking.

chr_mammography_screening.short_description: Percentage of female Medicare enrollees ages 65-74 receiving annual mammography screening.
chr_mammography_screening.long_description: Percentage of female Medicare enrollees ages 65-74 who received an annual mammography screening, from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care.
chr_mammography_screening.statement: In {location}, {value}% of eligible female Medicare enrollees received mammography screening.

chr_population.long_description: Total resident population, from the U.S. Census Bureau and American Community Survey (ACS).

chr_below_18_years_of_age.short_description: Percentage of population below 18 years of age.
chr_below_18_years_of_age.long_description: Percentage of population below 18 years of age, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_below_18_years_of_age.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population was under 18 years old.

chr_65_and_older.long_name: Percentage of Population Ages 65 and Older
chr_65_and_older.short_description: Percentage of population ages 65 and older.
chr_65_and_older.long_description: Percentage of population ages 65 and older, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_65_and_older.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population was 65 or older.

chr_non_hispanic_black.long_name: Percentage Non-Hispanic Black or African American
chr_non_hispanic_black.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as non-Hispanic Black or African American.
chr_non_hispanic_black.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as non-Hispanic Black or African American, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_non_hispanic_black.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as non-Hispanic Black or African American.

chr_american_indian_or_alaska_native.long_name: Percentage American Indian or Alaska Native
chr_american_indian_or_alaska_native.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as American Indian or Alaska Native.
chr_american_indian_or_alaska_native.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as American Indian or Alaska Native, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_american_indian_or_alaska_native.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as American Indian or Alaska Native.

chr_hispanic.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as Hispanic.
chr_hispanic.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as Hispanic, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_hispanic.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as Hispanic.

chr_female.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as female.
chr_female.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as female, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_female.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as female.

chr_rural.short_description: Percentage of population living in a census-defined rural area.
chr_rural.long_description: Percentage of population living in a census-defined rural area, from the U.S. Census Bureau.
chr_rural.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population lived in rural areas.

chr_not_proficient_in_english.short_description: Percentage of population aged 5+ who reported speaking English less than well.
chr_not_proficient_in_english.long_description: Percentage of population aged 5 and over who reported speaking English less than well, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_not_proficient_in_english.statement: In {location}, {value}% of residents ages 5+ reported limited English proficiency.

chr_diabetes_prevalence.short_description: Percentage of adults aged 18+ with diagnosed diabetes (age-adjusted).
chr_diabetes_prevalence.long_description: Percentage of adults aged 18 and above with diagnosed diabetes (age-adjusted), from the CDC Division of Diabetes Translation.
chr_diabetes_prevalence.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults had diagnosed diabetes.

chr_hiv_prevalence.short_description: People aged 13+ living with diagnosed HIV per 100,000 population.
chr_hiv_prevalence.long_description: Number of people aged 13 years and older living with a diagnosis of HIV infection per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for HIV/AIDS, Viral Hepatitis, STD, and TB Prevention.
chr_hiv_prevalence.statement: In {location}, there were {value} people living with diagnosed HIV per 100,000 population.

chr_mental_health_providers.short_description: Ratio of population to mental health providers.
chr_mental_health_providers.long_description: Ratio of the county population to the number of mental health providers practicing in the county, from the National Provider Identifier (NPI) registry.
chr_mental_health_providers.statement: In {location}, the mental health provider ratio was {value} residents per provider.

chr_median_household_income.short_description: The income where half of households earn more and half earn less.
chr_median_household_income.long_description: The income where half of households in a county earn more and half of households earn less, from the U.S. Census Bureau Small Area Income and Poverty Estimates (SAIPE).
chr_median_household_income.statement: In {location}, the median household income was ${value}.

chr_children_eligible_for_free_or_reduce.long_name: Children Eligible for Free or Reduced Price Lunch
chr_children_eligible_for_free_or_reduce.short_description: Percentage of children enrolled in public schools eligible for free or reduced price lunch.
chr_children_eligible_for_free_or_reduce.long_description: Percentage of children enrolled in public schools that are eligible for free or reduced price lunch, from the National Center for Education Statistics (NCES).
chr_children_eligible_for_free_or_reduce.statement: In {location}, {value}% of public school children were eligible for free or reduced price lunch.

chr_driving_alone_to_work.long_name: Workers Who Drive Alone to Work
chr_driving_alone_to_work.short_description: Percentage of the workforce that drives alone to work.
chr_driving_alone_to_work.long_description: Percentage of the workforce that drives alone to work, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_driving_alone_to_work.statement: In {location}, {value}% of workers drove alone to work.

chr_some_college.short_description: Percentage of adults ages 25-44 with some post-secondary education.
chr_some_college.long_description: Percentage of adults ages 25-44 with some post-secondary education, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_some_college.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults ages 25-44 had some post-secondary education.

chr_physical_inactivity.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting no leisure-time physical activity (age-adjusted).
chr_physical_inactivity.long_description: Percentage of adults age 18 and over reporting no leisure-time physical activity (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_physical_inactivity.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported no leisure-time physical activity.

chr_native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_isl.long_name: Percentage Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
chr_native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_isl.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander.
chr_native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_isl.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_native_hawaiian_or_other_pacific_isl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander.

chr_asian.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as Asian.
chr_asian.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as Asian, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_asian.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as Asian.

chr_children_in_single_parent_households.short_description: Percentage of children living in a household headed by a single parent.
chr_children_in_single_parent_households.long_description: Percentage of children that live in a household headed by a single parent, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_children_in_single_parent_households.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children lived in single-parent households.

chr_limited_access_to_healthy_foods.short_description: Percentage of population who are low-income and do not live close to a grocery store.
chr_limited_access_to_healthy_foods.long_description: Percentage of population who are low-income and do not live close to a grocery store, from the USDA Food Access Research Atlas.
chr_limited_access_to_healthy_foods.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population had limited access to healthy foods.

chr_uninsured.short_description: Percentage of population under age 65 without health insurance.
chr_uninsured.long_description: Percentage of population under age 65 without health insurance, from the Small Area Health Insurance Estimates (SAHIE) program.
chr_uninsured.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population under 65 lacked health insurance.

chr_dentists.long_description: Ratio of the county population to the number of dentists practicing in the county, from the American Dental Association.
chr_dentists.statement: In {location}, the dentist ratio was {value} residents per dentist.

chr_uninsured_children.short_description: Percentage of children under age 19 without health insurance.
chr_uninsured_children.long_description: Percentage of children under age 19 without health insurance, from the Small Area Health Insurance Estimates (SAHIE) program.
chr_uninsured_children.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children under 19 lacked health insurance.

chr_drinking_water_violations.short_description: Indicator of the presence of health-related drinking water violations.
chr_drinking_water_violations.long_description: Indicator of the presence of health-related drinking water violations, from the EPA Safe Drinking Water Information System (SDWIS).
chr_drinking_water_violations.statement: In {location}, health-related drinking water violations were present: {value}.

chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter.short_description: Average daily density of fine particulate matter in micrograms per cubic meter (PM2.5).
chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter.long_description: Average daily density of fine particulate matter in micrograms per cubic meter (PM2.5), from the EPA and NASA satellite data.
chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter.statement: In {location}, the average PM2.5 concentration was {value} micrograms per cubic meter.

chr_non_hispanic_white.short_description: Percentage of population identifying as non-Hispanic white.
chr_non_hispanic_white.long_description: Percentage of population identifying as non-Hispanic white, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_non_hispanic_white.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population identified as non-Hispanic white.

chr_premature_age_adjusted_mortality.short_description: Number of deaths among residents under age 75 per 100,000 population (age-adjusted).
chr_premature_age_adjusted_mortality.long_description: Number of deaths among residents under age 75 per 100,000 population (age-adjusted), from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_premature_age_adjusted_mortality.statement: In {location}, the premature age-adjusted mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_child_mortality.short_description: Number of deaths among residents under age 20 per 100,000 population.
chr_child_mortality.long_description: Number of deaths among residents under age 20 per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_child_mortality.statement: In {location}, the child mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population under 20.

chr_infant_mortality.short_description: Number of infant deaths (within 1 year) per 1,000 live births.
chr_infant_mortality.long_description: Number of infant deaths (within 1 year) per 1,000 live births, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Linked Birth/Infant Death data.
chr_infant_mortality.statement: In {location}, the infant mortality rate was {value} per 1,000 live births.

chr_other_primary_care_providers.short_description: Ratio of population to primary care providers other than physicians.
chr_other_primary_care_providers.long_description: Ratio of the county population to the number of primary care providers other than physicians (e.g., nurse practitioners, physician assistants), from the National Provider Identifier (NPI) registry.
chr_other_primary_care_providers.statement: In {location}, the other primary care provider ratio was {value} residents per provider.

chr_access_to_exercise_opportunities.long_name: Access to Locations for Physical Activity
chr_access_to_exercise_opportunities.short_description: Percentage of population with adequate access to locations for physical activity.
chr_access_to_exercise_opportunities.long_description: Percentage of population with adequate access to locations for physical activity (parks, recreation centers, fitness facilities), from the Esri and InfoUSA business listings.
chr_access_to_exercise_opportunities.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population had access to exercise opportunities.

chr_food_environment_index.short_description: Index of factors that contribute to a healthy food environment, from 0 (worst) to 10 (best).
chr_food_environment_index.long_description: Index of factors that contribute to a healthy food environment (0=worst, 10=best), incorporating food access and food insecurity data from the USDA Food Access Research Atlas and Map the Meal Gap.
chr_food_environment_index.statement: In {location}, the food environment index score was {value} (out of 10).

chr_alcohol_impaired_driving_deaths.short_description: Percentage of driving deaths with alcohol involvement.
chr_alcohol_impaired_driving_deaths.long_description: Percentage of driving deaths with alcohol involvement, from the Fatality Analysis Reporting System (FARS).
chr_alcohol_impaired_driving_deaths.statement: In {location}, {value}% of driving deaths involved alcohol.

chr_injury_deaths.short_description: Number of deaths due to injury per 100,000 population.
chr_injury_deaths.long_description: Number of deaths due to injury per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_injury_deaths.statement: In {location}, the injury death rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_severe_housing_problems.short_description: Percentage of households with at least 1 of 4 severe housing problems.
chr_severe_housing_problems.long_description: Percentage of households with at least 1 of 4 housing problems: overcrowding, high housing costs, lack of kitchen facilities, or lack of plumbing facilities, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Housing Survey.
chr_severe_housing_problems.statement: In {location}, {value}% of households had severe housing problems.

chr_long_commute_driving_alone.short_description: Among solo car commuters, the percentage commuting more than 30 minutes.
chr_long_commute_driving_alone.long_description: Among workers who commute in their car alone, the percentage that commute more than 30 minutes, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_long_commute_driving_alone.statement: In {location}, {value}% of solo car commuters had commutes longer than 30 minutes.

chr_drug_overdose_deaths.short_description: Number of drug poisoning deaths per 100,000 population.
chr_drug_overdose_deaths.long_description: Number of drug poisoning deaths per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_drug_overdose_deaths.statement: In {location}, the drug overdose death rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_food_insecurity.short_description: Percentage of population who lack adequate access to food.
chr_food_insecurity.long_description: Percentage of population who lack adequate access to food, from the USDA Economic Research Service Map the Meal Gap data.
chr_food_insecurity.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population experienced food insecurity.

chr_social_associations.short_description: Number of membership associations per 10,000 population.
chr_social_associations.long_description: Number of membership associations per 10,000 population, from the County Business Patterns data.
chr_social_associations.statement: In {location}, there were {value} social associations per 10,000 population.

chr_residential_segregation_black_white.short_description: Index of dissimilarity measuring residential segregation between Black and White residents.
chr_residential_segregation_black_white.long_description: Index of dissimilarity where higher values indicate greater residential segregation between Black and White county residents, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_residential_segregation_black_white.statement: In {location}, the Black/White residential segregation index was {value}.

chr_insufficient_sleep.short_description: Percentage of adults who report fewer than 7 hours of sleep on average (age-adjusted).
chr_insufficient_sleep.long_description: Percentage of adults who report fewer than 7 hours of sleep on average (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_insufficient_sleep.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported getting fewer than 7 hours of sleep.

chr_frequent_physical_distress.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting 14+ days of poor physical health per month (age-adjusted).
chr_frequent_physical_distress.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting 14 or more days of poor physical health per month (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_frequent_physical_distress.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported frequent physical distress.

chr_frequent_mental_distress.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting 14+ days of poor mental health per month (age-adjusted).
chr_frequent_mental_distress.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting 14 or more days of poor mental health per month (age-adjusted), from the BRFSS.
chr_frequent_mental_distress.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported frequent mental distress.

chr_life_expectancy.short_description: Average number of years people are expected to live.
chr_life_expectancy.long_description: Average number of years a person born in a given area is expected to live, based on age-specific death rates, from the National Center for Health Statistics and CDC WONDER.
chr_life_expectancy.statement: In {location}, life expectancy at birth was {value} years.

chr_firearm_fatalities.short_description: Number of deaths due to firearms per 100,000 population.
chr_firearm_fatalities.long_description: Number of deaths due to firearms per 100,000 population, from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_firearm_fatalities.statement: In {location}, the firearm fatality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_disconnected_youth.long_name: Disconnected Youth (Not Working or In School)
chr_disconnected_youth.short_description: Percentage of teens and young adults ages 16-19 neither working nor in school.
chr_disconnected_youth.long_description: Percentage of teens and young adults ages 16-19 who are neither working nor in school, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_disconnected_youth.statement: In {location}, {value}% of youth ages 16-19 were disconnected (not working or in school).

chr_gender_pay_gap.long_name: Women's Median Earnings as a Fraction of Men's
chr_gender_pay_gap.short_description: Ratio of women's to men's median earnings for full-time, year-round workers.
chr_gender_pay_gap.long_description: Ratio of women's median earnings to men's median earnings for all full-time, year-round workers (cents on the dollar), from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_gender_pay_gap.statement: In {location}, women earned {value} cents for every dollar earned by men.

chr_homeownership.long_description: Percentage of owner-occupied housing units, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_homeownership.statement: In {location}, {value}% of housing units were owner-occupied.

chr_severe_housing_cost_burden.long_name: Households with Severe Housing Cost Burden
chr_severe_housing_cost_burden.short_description: Percentage of households spending 50%+ of household income on housing.
chr_severe_housing_cost_burden.long_description: Percentage of households that spend 50% or more of their household income on housing, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_severe_housing_cost_burden.statement: In {location}, {value}% of households spent more than half their income on housing.

chr_flu_vaccinations.short_description: Percentage of fee-for-service Medicare enrollees who received an annual flu vaccination.
chr_flu_vaccinations.long_description: Percentage of fee-for-service (FFS) Medicare enrollees who had an annual flu vaccination, from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care.
chr_flu_vaccinations.statement: In {location}, {value}% of Medicare enrollees received a flu vaccination.

chr_traffic_volume.long_name: Average Traffic Volume on Major Roadways
chr_traffic_volume.short_description: Average traffic volume per meter of major roadways in the county.
chr_traffic_volume.long_description: Average traffic volume per meter of major roadways in the county, from the U.S. Department of Transportation Federal Highway Administration.
chr_traffic_volume.statement: In {location}, the average traffic volume was {value} vehicles per meter of roadway.

chr_reading_scores.short_description: Average grade level performance for 3rd graders on English Language Arts standardized tests.
chr_reading_scores.long_description: Average grade level performance for 3rd graders on English Language Arts standardized tests, from the Stanford Education Data Archive (SEDA).
chr_reading_scores.statement: In {location}, 3rd graders performed at grade level {value} on reading tests.

chr_math_scores.short_description: Average grade level performance for 3rd graders on math standardized tests.
chr_math_scores.long_description: Average grade level performance for 3rd graders on math standardized tests, from the Stanford Education Data Archive (SEDA).
chr_math_scores.statement: In {location}, 3rd graders performed at grade level {value} on math tests.

chr_suicides.short_description: Number of deaths due to suicide per 100,000 population (age-adjusted).
chr_suicides.long_description: Number of deaths due to suicide per 100,000 population (age-adjusted), from the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) Multiple Cause of Death files.
chr_suicides.statement: In {location}, the suicide rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_large_cities.short_description: Total number of cities with 50,000+ population.
chr_large_cities.long_description: The total number of cities with 50,000 plus population in the county, from the U.S. Census Bureau.
chr_large_cities.statement: In {location}, there were {value} cities with populations of 50,000 or more.

chr_broadband_access.short_description: Percentage of households with broadband internet connection.
chr_broadband_access.long_description: Percentage of households with broadband internet connection, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_broadband_access.statement: In {location}, {value}% of households had broadband internet access.

chr_school_segregation.short_description: Extent to which students of different race/ethnicity groups are unevenly distributed across schools.
chr_school_segregation.long_description: Index of dissimilarity measuring the extent to which students within different race and ethnicity groups are unevenly distributed across schools compared to the racial/ethnic composition of the local population (0=no segregation, 1=complete segregation), from the National Center for Education Statistics (NCES).
chr_school_segregation.statement: In {location}, the school segregation index was {value}.

chr_high_school_completion.short_description: Percentage of adults ages 25+ with a high school diploma or equivalent.
chr_high_school_completion.long_description: Percentage of adults ages 25 and over with a high school diploma or equivalent, from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_high_school_completion.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults ages 25+ had a high school diploma or equivalent.

chr_school_funding_adequacy.short_description: Average gap in dollars between actual and required spending per pupil in public school districts.
chr_school_funding_adequacy.long_description: The average gap in dollars between actual and required spending per pupil among public school districts. Required spending is an estimate of dollars needed to achieve U.S. average test scores in each district, from EdBuild.
chr_school_funding_adequacy.statement: In {location}, the school funding adequacy gap was ${value} per pupil.

chr_living_wage.long_name: Living Wage (Family of One Adult, Two Children)
chr_living_wage.short_description: Hourly wage needed to cover basic household expenses for one adult and two children.
chr_living_wage.long_description: The hourly wage needed to cover basic household expenses plus all relevant taxes for a household of one adult and two children, from the MIT Living Wage Calculator.
chr_living_wage.statement: In {location}, the living wage for one adult and two children was ${value} per hour.

chr_child_care_cost_burden.long_name: Child Care Cost as Percentage of Income
chr_child_care_cost_burden.short_description: Child care costs for a household with two children as a percent of median household income.
chr_child_care_cost_burden.long_description: Child care costs for a household with two children as a percent of median household income, from the National Database of Childcare Prices.
chr_child_care_cost_burden.statement: In {location}, child care for two children cost {value}% of median household income.

chr_child_care_centers.long_name: Child Care Centers per 1,000 Children Under 5
chr_child_care_centers.short_description: Number of child care centers per 1,000 population under 5 years old.
chr_child_care_centers.long_description: Number of child care centers per 1,000 population under 5 years old, from the National Center on Early Childhood Quality Assurance.
chr_child_care_centers.statement: In {location}, there were {value} child care centers per 1,000 children under 5.

chr_redlining.short_description: Indicator of presence of HOLC C or D graded (redlined) neighborhoods.
chr_redlining.long_description: Indicator of presence of all or part of Home Owners' Loan Corporation (HOLC) C or D graded neighborhood(s) in the county, from the National Community Reinvestment Coalition.

chr_core_based_statistical_areas.short_description: County Core Based Statistical Area designation.
chr_core_based_statistical_areas.long_description: County Core Based Statistical Area (CBSA) designation from the U.S. Office of Management and Budget, indicating metropolitan or micropolitan status.

chr_state_capitols.short_description: Indicator of whether a county is part of a state capitol city.
chr_state_capitols.long_description: Indicator of whether a county is part of a state capitol city.

chr_voter_turnout.short_description: Percentage of citizen population aged 18+ who voted in the 2020 U.S. Presidential election.
chr_voter_turnout.long_description: Percentage of citizen population aged 18 or older who voted in the 2020 U.S. Presidential election, from the MIT Election Data + Science Lab.
chr_voter_turnout.statement: In {location}, {value}% of eligible citizens voted in the 2020 presidential election.

chr_census_participation.short_description: Percentage of households that self-responded to the 2020 census.
chr_census_participation.long_description: Percentage of all households that self-responded to the 2020 census (by internet, paper questionnaire or telephone), from the U.S. Census Bureau.
chr_census_participation.statement: In {location}, {value}% of households self-responded to the 2020 census.

chr_access_to_parks.short_description: Percentage of the population living within a half mile of a park.
chr_access_to_parks.long_description: Percentage of the population living within a half mile of a park, from the Trust for Public Land ParkScore.
chr_access_to_parks.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population lived within half a mile of a park.

chr_disability_functional_limitations.long_name: Adults with Functional Limitations Due to Disability
chr_disability_functional_limitations.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting any of six specific functional limitations.
chr_disability_functional_limitations.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting any of six specific functional limitations (hearing, vision, cognitive, ambulatory, self-care, or independent living difficulties), from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS).
chr_disability_functional_limitations.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported functional limitations.

chr_library_access.short_description: Library visits per person living within the library service area per year.
chr_library_access.long_description: Library visits per person living within the library service area per year, from the Institute of Museum and Library Services Public Libraries Survey.
chr_library_access.statement: In {location}, there were {value} library visits per person per year.

chr_adverse_climate_events.long_name: Adverse Climate and Weather Events Indicator
chr_adverse_climate_events.short_description: Indicator of thresholds met for extreme heat, drought, and disaster events over five years.
chr_adverse_climate_events.long_description: Indicator of thresholds met for the following adverse climate and weather-related event categories: extreme heat (300+ days above 90°F), moderate or greater drought (65+ weeks), and disaster (2+ presidential disaster declarations) over the five-year period. From NOAA and FEMA.
chr_adverse_climate_events.statement: In {location}, the adverse climate events indicator was {value}.

chr_feelings_of_loneliness.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting that they always, usually or sometimes feel lonely.
chr_feelings_of_loneliness.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting that they always, usually or sometimes feel lonely, from the CDC BRFSS.
chr_feelings_of_loneliness.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported feelings of loneliness.

chr_lack_of_social_and_emotional_support.long_name: Adults Lacking Social and Emotional Support
chr_lack_of_social_and_emotional_support.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting they sometimes, rarely, or never get needed social and emotional support.
chr_lack_of_social_and_emotional_support.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting that they sometimes, rarely, or never get the social and emotional support they need, from the CDC BRFSS.
chr_lack_of_social_and_emotional_support.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported lacking adequate social and emotional support.

census_ur_pct_urban_pop.long_name: Percent of County Population Living in Urban Areas (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.short_description: Share of county population residing in Census-defined urban areas.
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.long_description: Proportion of a county's 2020 Census population living within Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas and urban clusters combined). Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File by summing each county's urban-area population share across all intersecting urban areas. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives in urban areas.

census_ur_pct_urban_land.long_name: Percent of County Land Area Classified as Urban (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_land.short_description: Share of county land area within Census-defined urban areas.
census_ur_pct_urban_land.long_description: Proportion of a county's total land area that falls within Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas and urban clusters combined). Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_land.statement: In {location}, {value} of the land area is classified as urban.

census_ur_pct_urban_hu.long_name: Percent of County Housing Units in Urban Areas (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_hu.short_description: Share of county housing units located in Census-defined urban areas.
census_ur_pct_urban_hu.long_description: Proportion of a county's 2020 Census housing units located within Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas and urban clusters combined). Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_hu.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are in urban areas.

epic_diabetes_hba1c.short_description: Percentage of patients with diabetes, identified by HbA1c, in Epic Cosmos health systems.
epic_diabetes_hba1c.long_description: Percentage of patients with diabetes identified by elevated HbA1c laboratory results among patients seen within Epic Cosmos-participating health systems. The share of each county's population captured by Epic Cosmos varies, so counties with low capture may be unrepresentative.
epic_diabetes_hba1c.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients in Epic Cosmos health systems had diabetes.

epic_obesity_bmi.short_description: Percentage of patients with obesity, identified by BMI, in Epic Cosmos health systems.
epic_obesity_bmi.long_description: Percentage of patients with obesity (body mass index ≥ 30) identified from recorded BMI among patients seen within Epic Cosmos-participating health systems. The share of each county's population captured by Epic Cosmos varies, so counties with low capture may be unrepresentative.
epic_obesity_bmi.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients in Epic Cosmos health systems had obesity.

brfss_diabetes.short_description: Percentage of adults who report ever being told they have diabetes.
brfss_diabetes.long_description: Percentage of adults who report ever being told by a doctor that they have diabetes, from the CDC Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS). Estimates are self-reported and carry sampling confidence intervals.
brfss_diabetes.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults had diagnosed diabetes.

brfss_obesity.short_description: Percentage of adults with a body mass index of 30 or higher.
brfss_obesity.long_description: Percentage of adults with a self-reported body mass index (BMI) of 30 or higher, from the CDC Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS). Estimates are self-reported and carry sampling confidence intervals.

cms_{condition}.long_description: Percentage of Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries with {condition.short_name}, from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities tool. Estimates reflect the Medicare population, not the general population, and small counts may be suppressed.

colorectal_breast_prostate_lung_cancer.short_name: colorectal, breast, prostate, or lung cancer

cms_scrn_prvnt_{service}.short_description: Percentage of eligible Medicare beneficiaries who received {service.short_name}.
cms_scrn_prvnt_{service}.long_description: Percentage of eligible Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries who received {service.short_name}, from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities tool. Estimates reflect the Medicare population, not the general population, and small counts may be suppressed.
cms_scrn_prvnt_{service}.statement: In {location}, {value}% of eligible Medicare beneficiaries received {service.short_name}.

nis_{vaccine}.long_description: Percentage of children vaccinated with {vaccine.short_name}, from the CDC National Immunization Survey (NIS). Coverage is reported by birth cohort at the milestone assessment age; the most recent cohorts have not yet reached all milestone ages.

svv_{vaccine}.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with {vaccine.short_name}, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.

svv_exempt_{type}.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a {type.short_name} from one or more required vaccines, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Exemption definitions vary by state.

exempt_mmr_{type}.short_description: Estimated percentage with a {type.short_name} from MMR vaccination.
exempt_mmr_{type}.long_description: Estimated percentage of children with a {type.short_name} from MMR vaccination. Exemption definitions and reporting completeness vary by state; some county values are state-level estimates.

wapo_mmr_coverage.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated against measles, mumps, and rubella.
wapo_mmr_coverage.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated against measles, mumps, and rubella (MMR), compiled by The Washington Post from state health department records. Coverage definitions vary by state.
wapo_mmr_coverage.statement: In {location}, {value}% of kindergartners were vaccinated against MMR.

healthmap_mmr_coverage.short_description: Modeled MMR vaccination coverage from HealthMap.
healthmap_mmr_coverage.long_description: MMR vaccination coverage compiled and modeled by HealthMap from state and local immunization data. Coverage definitions vary by source jurisdiction.
healthmap_mmr_coverage.statement: In {location}, modeled MMR vaccination coverage was {value}%.

nchs_overdose_deaths.short_description: Provisional count of drug overdose deaths.
nchs_overdose_deaths.long_description: Provisional monthly count of drug overdose deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.
nchs_overdose_deaths.statement: In {location}, there were {value} drug overdose deaths.

nchs_overdose_pct_pending.long_name: Percentage of Overdose Deaths Pending Investigation (NCHS)
nchs_overdose_pct_pending.short_description: Percentage of overdose death records pending investigation.
nchs_overdose_pct_pending.long_description: Percentage of drug overdose death records still pending investigation, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Higher values indicate counts more likely to be revised upward.
nchs_overdose_pct_pending.statement: In {location}, {value}% of overdose death records were pending investigation.

nchs_deaths_{cause}.long_description: Provisional monthly count of {cause.short_name} deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_pct_complete.short_description: Estimated completeness of provisional death records.
nchs_pct_complete.long_description: Estimated percentage completeness of provisional mortality records for the period, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Lower values indicate counts more likely to be revised upward.
nchs_pct_complete.statement: In {location}, provisional death records were {value}% complete.

nchs_pct_pending_invest.long_name: Percentage of Death Records Pending Investigation (NCHS)
nchs_pct_pending_invest.short_description: Percentage of death records pending investigation.
nchs_pct_pending_invest.long_description: Percentage of mortality records still pending investigation, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Higher values indicate counts more likely to be revised upward.
nchs_pct_pending_invest.statement: In {location}, {value}% of death records were pending investigation.

nchs_rate_all_causes.short_description: Age-adjusted deaths from all causes per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_all_causes.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from all causes per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_all_causes.statement: In {location}, the all-cause mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_alzheimer_disease.short_description: Age-adjusted Alzheimer's disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_alzheimer_disease.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from Alzheimer's disease per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_alzheimer_disease.statement: In {location}, the Alzheimer's disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_cancer.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from cancer (malignant neoplasms) per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_cancer.statement: In {location}, the cancer mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_chronic_liver_disease_and_cirr.long_name: Chronic Liver Disease and Cirrhosis Mortality Rate (NCHS)
nchs_rate_chronic_liver_disease_and_cirr.short_description: Age-adjusted chronic liver disease and cirrhosis deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_chronic_liver_disease_and_cirr.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from chronic liver disease and cirrhosis per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_chronic_liver_disease_and_cirr.statement: In {location}, the chronic liver disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_chronic_lower_respiratory_dise.long_name: Chronic Lower Respiratory Diseases Mortality Rate (NCHS)
nchs_rate_chronic_lower_respiratory_dise.short_description: Age-adjusted chronic lower respiratory disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_chronic_lower_respiratory_dise.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from chronic lower respiratory diseases per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_chronic_lower_respiratory_dise.statement: In {location}, the chronic lower respiratory disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_covid_19.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from COVID-19 per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_covid_19.statement: In {location}, the COVID-19 mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_diabetes.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from diabetes per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_diabetes.statement: In {location}, the diabetes mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_drug_overdose.short_description: Age-adjusted drug overdose deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_drug_overdose.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from drug overdose per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_drug_overdose.statement: In {location}, the drug overdose mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.long_name: Fall-Related Mortality Rate, Ages 65 and Over (NCHS)
nchs_rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.short_description: Age-adjusted fall-related deaths among adults 65 and over per 100,000.
nchs_rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from falls among adults ages 65 and over per 100,000 population in that age group, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_falls_ages_65_and_over.statement: In {location}, the fall-related mortality rate among adults 65 and over was {value} per 100,000.

nchs_rate_firearm_related_injury.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from firearm-related injuries per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_firearm_related_injury.statement: In {location}, the firearm-related mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_heart_disease.short_description: Age-adjusted heart disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_heart_disease.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from heart disease per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_heart_disease.statement: In {location}, the heart disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_hiv_disease.short_description: Age-adjusted HIV disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_hiv_disease.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from HIV disease per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_hiv_disease.statement: In {location}, the HIV disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_homicide.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from homicide per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_homicide.statement: In {location}, the homicide mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_hypertension.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from essential hypertension and hypertensive renal disease per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_hypertension.statement: In {location}, the hypertension mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_influenza_and_pneumonia.short_description: Age-adjusted influenza and pneumonia deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_influenza_and_pneumonia.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from influenza and pneumonia per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_influenza_and_pneumonia.statement: In {location}, the influenza and pneumonia mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_kidney_disease.short_description: Age-adjusted kidney disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_kidney_disease.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from nephritis, nephrotic syndrome, and nephrosis per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_kidney_disease.statement: In {location}, the kidney disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_parkinson_disease.short_description: Age-adjusted Parkinson's disease deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_parkinson_disease.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from Parkinson's disease per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_parkinson_disease.statement: In {location}, the Parkinson's disease mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_pneumonitis_due_to_solids_and_.long_name: Pneumonitis Due to Solids and Liquids Mortality Rate (NCHS)
nchs_rate_pneumonitis_due_to_solids_and_.short_description: Age-adjusted deaths from pneumonitis due to solids and liquids per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_pneumonitis_due_to_solids_and_.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from pneumonitis due to solids and liquids (aspiration pneumonitis) per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_pneumonitis_due_to_solids_and_.statement: In {location}, the aspiration pneumonitis mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_stroke.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from cerebrovascular diseases (stroke) per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_stroke.statement: In {location}, the stroke mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_suicide.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from intentional self-harm (suicide) per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_suicide.statement: In {location}, the suicide mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

nchs_rate_unintentional_injuries.short_description: Age-adjusted unintentional injury deaths per 100,000 population.
nchs_rate_unintentional_injuries.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from unintentional (accidental) injuries per 100,000 population, from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics.
nchs_rate_unintentional_injuries.statement: In {location}, the unintentional injury mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.
